description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional chaise with a modern, minimalist design, upholstered in a dark, likely leather or faux-leather material. The chaise features a continuous backrest and seat cushions, with the backrest wrapping around two sides to form a right angle. The seat is divided into three main sections on one side and an extended chaise lounge on the other, providing ample seating space. The legs are short, straight, and appear to be made of wood or metal with a dark finish, slightly elevating the piece off the ground. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with no visible patterns or tufting, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. This type of chaise would be suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern living rooms, or communal lounge areas.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional chaise with smooth, dark upholstery and a modern, minimalist design. It features a continuous backrest, straight legs, and ample seating space.
description_view_0: The chaise is viewed from above and slightly to the side, clearly showing the L-shape and the arrangement of the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: This view highlights the opposite angle of the L-shape, emphasizing the extended chaise lounge section and the continuous backrest.
description_view_2: A side view showing the length of the backrest and the straight, short legs, with the seat cushions aligned in a row.
description_view_3: Another side view from the opposite end, displaying the backrest's full length and the sectional's overall depth.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is continuous, straight, and moderately high, wrapping around two sides of the chaise to form a right angle. It is segmented to match the seat cushions but features no visible tufting, buttons, or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has a single armrest on one end of the shorter section, integrated into the backrest design, with no armrest on the extended lounge side.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and cylindrical, likely made of wood or metal with a dark finish, and are minimally visible beneath the base of the chaise.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid in color, smooth, and lacks any visible pattern, tufting, or quilting, contributing to a sleek and modern appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three main seat cushions on the longer section and one extended cushion forming the chaise lounge, all attached and aligned with the backrest. The cushions are uniform in size and thickness, with no loose or layered arrangement.
